notes.style-guide: Tone: intimate, sensory, direct. Avoid purple exposition. Prefer concrete objects and subtext.
notes.launch-checklist: Before release: verify template, runtime flags, no-thinking, thinking budget, tool calls, vision, creative writing, agentic automation.
notes.carl-prefs: Carl should use concise summaries, preserve user intent, and avoid claiming tests that were not run.

notes.Creative Brief: Stormlit Apartment Scene:
SCENE BRIEF: Stormlit Apartment
TONE: Intimate, sensory, subtext-driven (per Style Guide).
SETTING: Mid-century apartment. Heavy rain against windowpanes. Low amber lamp light vs. cool blue lightning flashes.
CHARACTERS: [Character A] & [Character B].
ACTION: Slow, tension-filled proximity. Focus on micro-gestures (a hand brushing a sleeve, shared breath, eye contact).
SOUNDSCAPE: Low rumble of thunder, rhythmic rain, muffled city sounds.
VISUAL KEY: High contrast shadows, moisture on glass, soft focus on skin textures.
NOTE: Keep it non-explicit; focus on the 'almost' and the tension of the atmosphere.
